nasb.text: The Lord hurled a great wind on the sea and there was a great storm on the sea so that the ship was about to break up.

esv.text: But the Lord hurled a great wind upon the sea, and there was a mighty tempest on the sea, so that the ship threatened to break up.

cnv.text: 但是耶和華在海上忽然颳起大風，於是海中狂風大作，船幾乎要破裂了。

ccb.text: 然而，耶和华使海面起了狂风，滔天巨浪几乎把船打成碎片。

csbs.text: 然而，耶和华使海上刮起大风，海上就起了大风暴，致使船几乎要破裂。
